trainingSessions.notes: Worked on spider guard sweeps and transitions to X-guard
Leg lock entries and heel hook defences
Open mat with visiting grapplers from Austria
Kimura trap from half guard bottom and top
Class before belt promotion ceremony – flow rolling only
Wrestling takedowns: double leg and arm drag to back
Outdoor grappling session during annual summer camp
Back takes and finishing the rear naked choke
Competition prep – guard retention and recovery drills
Inside heel hooks and kneebar positional awareness
Post-competition review: pressure passing and top control
Drop-in session while travelling for work
End-of-year open mat – casual rounds with everyone
New year, back to basics: mount escapes and bridging
Freestyle rounds with no fixed game plan
Competition prep: pressure passing and guard break sequences

beltPromotions.notes: Promoted after 14 months at white belt. Both stripes awarded on the same day in recognition of consistent attendance and competition results.

competitions.name: Spring Open BJJ Championship
competitions.notes: Lost the final by 2 points after two strong wins. Opponent scored a takedown in the last 30 seconds. Great experience overall.

competitions.name: Autumn Submission Wrestling Cup
competitions.notes: Won all three matches by submission: rear naked choke in quarterfinal, RNC again in semifinal, armbar in the final. Best performance so far.
